xperience.text: Place pill into box — The hand moves a blue pill from the table surface into the cardboard shipping box.
xperience.label: Place pill into box

xperience.text: Pick up snack packet — The person reaches into the plastic bin and grabs a single snack packet.
xperience.label: Pick up snack packet

xperience.text: Cut cardboard — The user finishes cutting a rectangular strip of cardboard using the utility knife.
xperience.label: Cut cardboard

xperience.text: Examine puzzle piece — The user holds a single puzzle piece, examining its shape and pattern while deciding where it fits.
xperience.label: Examine puzzle piece

xperience.text: Remove ruler and pen — The user lifts the pen away from the ruler after finishing the mark, preparing to adjust or move to the next task.
xperience.label: Remove ruler and pen

xperience.text: Sort star-shaped items — The user picks up individual small star-shaped items from the pile and organizes them into color-coded groups on the table.
xperience.label: Sort star-shaped items

xperience.text: Loading labeler — The person holds a price tag labeler and interacts with another person to insert a roll of price tags.
xperience.label: Loading labeler

xperience.text: Cut cardboard — The user holds a metal ruler firmly on the cardboard and moves the utility knife along the edge to make a straight cut. The user is holding a metal ruler down on a piece of cardboard and running a utility knife along the edge to make a precise cut.
xperience.label: Cut cardboard

xperience.text: Sort small items into container — The user picks up small colored items from the table and places them into the cardboard box.
xperience.label: Sort small items into container

xperience.text: Separate paper strip — The right hand pulls a single blue paper strip away from the main stack of paper. The hands hold and adjust a single light blue paper strip, preparing it for the quilling process.
xperience.label: Separate paper strip

xperience.text: Organize cardboard pieces — The user finishes cutting and begins arranging the small cardboard squares into a neat stack on the table.
xperience.label: Organize cardboard pieces

xperience.text: Cut newspaper with scissors — The user holds scissors in their right hand and uses them to cut through a newspaper spread on the table. The user continues to use scissors to cut along the edge of the newspaper laid out on the table.
xperience.label: Cut newspaper with scissors

xperience.text: Sort puzzle pieces — The user is actively sorting and organizing white puzzle pieces on the table, moving them around with both hands.
xperience.label: Sort puzzle pieces

xperience.text: Place smartphone on table — The user places the smartphone onto the table surface near the jigsaw puzzle pieces.
xperience.label: Place smartphone on table

xperience.text: Hold product — The user holds the food product in their hand while looking at the shelf.
xperience.label: Hold product

xperience.text: Cut tape — One researcher holds a roll of yellow tape while the other cuts a piece of tape using scissors.
xperience.label: Cut tape

xperience.text: Place finished star and reach for paper strip — The person moves their hands away from the center to set down the star and reaches towards the stack of paper strips.
xperience.label: Place finished star and reach for paper strip

xperience.text: Scroll on smartphone — The user holds their smartphone and scrolls through a feed on the screen with their right index finger.
xperience.label: Scroll on smartphone

xperience.text: Reach for pieces — The user reaches toward the pile of unsorted puzzle pieces to pick more up. The user continues to touch and shift puzzle pieces scattered on the table with both hands to find matching connections.
xperience.label: Reach for pieces

xperience.text: Cut newspaper with scissors — The user holds a pair of scissors with the right hand and cuts along the edge of a section of the newspaper held by the left hand.
xperience.label: Cut newspaper with scissors

xperience.text: Sort beads — The person continues to pick through the pile of beads on the table, manually separating them by color. The user is carefully selecting and arranging individual small beads, focusing on isolating them from a pile on the desk.
xperience.label: Sort beads

xperience.text: Manipulate origami star — The hands hold a small yellow origami star, adjusting its position and checking its shape.
xperience.label: Manipulate origami star

xperience.text: Pick up earbud case — The user picks up the white earbud charging case from the desk surface.
xperience.label: Pick up earbud case

xperience.text: Move smartphone — The user shifts the position of the smartphone on the cardboard surface to adjust the template or guide.
xperience.label: Move smartphone

xperience.text: Sort puzzle pieces — The user sifts through and organizes puzzle pieces on the table surface to find a match. The user is actively searching through and rearranging loose puzzle pieces on the table to find specific shapes or patterns.
xperience.label: Sort puzzle pieces

xperience.text: Position cardboard — The user adjusts and aligns a large sheet of cardboard on the table surface.
xperience.label: Position cardboard

xperience.text: Reach for pieces — The user moves their hand toward a pile of puzzle pieces to continue sorting.
xperience.label: Reach for pieces

xperience.text: Place star into pouch — The person picks up a finished origami star and drops it into a small grey fabric pouch held in their other hand.
xperience.label: Place star into pouch

xperience.text: Pick up another item — The person reaches for and picks up another food container from a stack or nearby surface to prepare for shelving.
xperience.label: Pick up another item

xperience.text: Place toy spider in bucket — The person moves their hand toward a white bucket and places the toy spider inside it.
xperience.label: Place toy spider in bucket
